hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|css|json|html)$' && pnpm prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && cargo fmt --manifest-path /home/jeffutter/src/graphql-playground/Cargo.toml; } 2>/dev/null || true
